failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the required catalog evidence needed to answer whether the item has RAM=8GB.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had the correct goal and made the required ProductCatalogSearch call with well-formed arguments. At index 3, the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, with message that the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a schema/argument error, not a guardrail/access block, and not a misunderstanding of the user intent.
